changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.policyTip: Use 6~100 characters. Letters, numbers, spaces, and half-width special characters are supported.
changePassword.strongPolicyTip: Use {length}~100 characters and include uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, and half-width special characters.
changePassword.success: Password changed. Please sign in again.

validation.confirmPasswordRequired: Confirm new password cannot be empty.
validation.confirmPasswordMismatch: The two passwords do not match.
validation.samePassword: The new password must be different from the old password
validation.passwordCharset: Use letters, numbers, spaces, or half-width special characters

errors.newPasswordInvalid: The new password does not meet the policy.
errors.newPasswordIsInitial: The new password cannot be the initial password
errors.passwordInvalidLocked: Too many incorrect old password attempts. The account is locked. Try again later.
errors.accountLocked: The account is locked. Contact an administrator.
errors.accountUnavailable: Unable to get the current account. Sign in again and try again.
errors.configLoadFailed: Failed to load the password policy. Try again later.
errors.submitFailed: Failed to change password. Try again later.
